title: Life's for Living: Aadmi
writer: Munshi Aziz, A. Bhaskarrao, Anant Kanekar
plot: A love tragedy featuring a policeman, Moti (Modak) and a prostitute, Kesar (Hublikar). Moti saves Kesar from a police raid on a brothel and they fall in love. Her reputation and sense of guilt resist his attempts to rehabilitate h...
